---
title: "Invoices"
description: "Generate invoices automatically and track payment status."
category: "Product Guide"
order: 9
icon: "receipt"
---

Invoices are generated automatically when milestones are released. No manual invoicing required.

## Auto-Generated Invoices

When a milestone is approved and released, ORKA creates an invoice with:

- Project and milestone details
- Amount and currency
- Payment date and method
- Transaction reference

## Invoice Details

Each invoice includes:

- **Invoice Number**: Unique identifier
- **Date**: When the milestone was released
- **Amount**: Total payment amount
- **Status**: Paid, pending, or processing
- **Transaction Hash**: Stellar blockchain reference

## Viewing Invoices

Access invoices from:

- The project's **Payments** tab
- The **Invoices** section in your workspace
- Your email (auto-sent when released)

<Callout type="info">
Invoices are stored permanently and can be exported for accounting and tax purposes.
</Callout>

## Exporting Invoices

Download invoices in multiple formats:

- PDF for accounting
- CSV for spreadsheet import
- JSON for API integration
